title: Zombie Break & Build
description: Allows zombies (and other mobs) to break and place blocks to reach their target!
body:
Zombies Break & Build mod enhances zombies (and optionally other mobs) by giving them the ability to break and place blocks.

![An example of zombie actions with this mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XTiK555/ZombieBreakAndBuild/develop/showcase/example_zombie_actions.gif)

---

### ✨Features
- Zombies (and others) can
  - Break and place blocks.
  - (Optional) See targets through walls.
  - (Optional) Always see the nearest player.
- (Optional) Placed blocks by zombies can disappear and broken blocks can be restored over time.
- Flexible mob support via the config.
- Customizable balance settings in the config.

_(The config file is located at `[your server folder]\config\zombies-break-&-build.toml`, or if you are playing in single-player, look in your local `[your minecraft folder]\config\` directory.)_

---

### 🛠️Installation
1. Install a compatible mod loader (Fabric/Forge/NeoForge).
2. Download and put the mod `.jar` in `[your server folder]\mods\` folder. Or if you are playing in single-player, put in your local `[your minecraft folder]\mods\` folder.

---
This mod will make your zombie/apocalypse mod pack more difficult!
